text:
Created attachment 251559
shar archive

yass is lightweight and Secure http/socks4/socks5 proxy which has five flavors. The basic flavor is console which only contains one command line tool yass_cli and its manpage. The gtk3 and gtk4 flavors are recommended for gnome and gnome-like desktop. The qt5 and qt6 flavors are recommended for kde and kde-like desktop.

And it should support different architecures more than just amd64 like its linux support but that remains untested. We're likely to add the support in future.
